Package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model

Class Ech0196Security

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model.Ech0196Security
public class Ech0196Security extends Object
Individual security position within an eCH-0196 depot.
